questions.question: Explain the safety and liveness properties in distributed mutual exclusion.
expectedPoints: Safety: At most one process in critical section at any time
Liveness: Every request to enter CS is eventually granted
Explanation of why both are essential

questions.question: Compare and contrast centralized and distributed (Lamport's) mutual exclusion algorithms.
expectedPoints: Centralized: Coordinator-based, 3 messages, single point of failure
Distributed: Fully decentralized, 3(n-1) messages, no single point of failure
